name: Human-in-the-Loop User Feedback Affects Perceived Accuracy and Trust, but Task Subjectivity Matters

description: arXiv:2607.17548v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: While ML can produce complex models beyond those that a human could produce manually, incorporating human input can often improve performance beyond purely data-driven models. While this feedback could come from system designers or domain experts, in many cases, the end users who regularly use the system will naturally develop an understanding o...
author: Donald R. Honeycutt, Mahsan Nourani, Eric D. Ragan
